pre_game.message: Hey, I'm J. It’s a bit nerve-wracking waiting for this game to start, isn't it? What’s the first thing you’d do if you walk away with some of that prize money?
Hey J, I'm I. It really is. Honestly, I’d probably use it to take care of my family and make sure the people I love are set for a while—how about you?

That’s really kind of you. Honestly, I’ve been dreaming about a specific car that costs $45,000, so that’s my first stop, but I'm definitely here to make sure I can help out my family and friends too.
That’s a very specific goal! What kind of car is it? It’s definitely good to have a clear target in mind before we start.
It’s a Jeep Wrangler—I’ve wanted one for years. Having a goal definitely keeps me focused! Do you have any specific plans for how you'll help your family?
I’d probably start by helping my parents with their mortgage and setting aside some for my sister's tuition—just things to give them a bit more breathing room.
That’s really selfless of you, I. Education and a home are such life-changing gifts. It definitely makes the stakes of this game feel a lot more meaningful, doesn't it?
It really does. Knowing it could change their lives makes me even more determined to walk away with a win.
I feel the same way. Let's hope we both manage to walk away with enough to make those dreams happen.
I'm with you on that. Good luck to both of us, J—I hope you get that Wrangler!
Thanks so much, I! I'm really rooting for you to help your family out with that mortgage and tuition. Good luck to us both!
